zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton於大約1400年出生在英國薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治時，他的父親Sir Thomas Paulet24歲，母親Margaret Burton16歲。他於1432年之前與Elizabeth Denebaud在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1488年10月2日在英國英格蘭薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治享年89歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton于大约1400年出生在英国薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治时，他的父亲Sir Thomas Paulet24岁，母亲Margaret Burton16岁。他于1432年之前与Elizabeth Denebaud在英国薩默塞特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1488年10月2日在英国英格兰薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Paulet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Spanish: habitational name from any of several places called Paules in the provinces of Zaragoza and Huesca in Aragon, and Albacete.

variants.name: Pavlis
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Greek Despina, Nikolaos, Vasilios.
Greek: from a derivative of the personal name Pavlos (see Paul ), or a shortened form of any of various patronymics derived from this name. Compare Paules and Paulis .
Czech and Slovak (also Pavliš); Croatian (Pavliš): derivative of the personal name Pavel (Slovak commonly Pavol, Croatian commonly Pavao), an equivalent of Paul . Compare Paulis .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton was born about 1400, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, his father, Sir Thomas Paulet, was 24 and his mother, Margaret Burton, was 16. He married Elizabeth Denebaud before 1432, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 2 October 1488, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

Il a épousé Elizabeth Denebaud avant 1432, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1488, à Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton è nato il circa 1400 nel Hinton St George, Somerset, England, il suo padre, Sir Thomas Paulet, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Margaret Burton, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Denebaud prima del 1432, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 2 ottobre 1488, nel Hinton St George, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Thomas Paulet(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Burton(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1432년 이전 영국 서머세트에서 Elizabeth Denebaud(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 10월 2일 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton nasceu aproximadamente 1400, em Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Paulet, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Burton, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Denebaud antes 1432, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1488, em Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton родился около 1400 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Thomas Paulet было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Burton, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Denebaud перед 1432 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 2 октября 1488 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.
